sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30560" key="e)gxeiriste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγχειριστέον</orth>, <sense id="n30560.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must undertake</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg006:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
